title: POST-H-012-E — Quality gate y runbook de aprobación
commands: python -m devpilot_core schema validate --schema-id PostHManifest --instance docs/post_h_012_e_manifest.json --json
pass_criteria: Quality gate hardening includes approval-rbac-hardening and passes.
Test Contract Registry v1/v2 includes the POST-H-012-E contract and validates.
Runbook and Human Approval Card document request/approve/deny/revoke, actor, role_at_decision and interface.
Examples keep dry-run/local-first semantics and no remote/write/plugin execution remains enabled.
block_criteria: Permanent global approval for critical actions is recommended.
Revocation or denial path is missing from operational docs.
Actor, role_at_decision or interface are omitted from approval/RBAC lifecycle.
Remote execution, connector write, plugin execution or destructive side effects are enabled.
risks: Capability is implemented-initial and local-first, not IAM enterprise.
Role taxonomy gaps remain visible and blocking by design.
Sensitive actions remain non-executable even when approval/RBAC metadata is valid.
summary: POST-H-012-E adds approval-rbac-hardening quality gate integration and approval lifecycle runbook documentation, closing POST-H-012 as implemented-initial.
